My agreement stems primarily because IVF offers an effective solution specifically tailored for conditions where fallopian tube function is compromised, such as bilateral tubal blockage at the cornual regions observed here. Additionally, considering the complexity involved in surgically unblocking both sides simultaneously versus initiating a straightforward IVF protocol underscores why choosing IVF aligns best with current reproductive medicine practices aimed at optimizing chances of pregnancy promptly and efficiently.
